review_notes: v002 REWORK (loop 1 of 1): skin plane distribution inverted to match card Identity — palest of cast. flesh_0 is now the dominant face plane, flesh_1 reduced to a narrow lit strip on the front profile edge, shadow edges toward hair/ear/jaw cooled with soot_3, flesh_2 kept to 2 px (forehead scalp + nose ridge). Measured head region (seated_listen, y26-41): flesh_0=44, flesh_1=9, soot_3=16 (incl. hair shade), flesh_2=2 (v001 was flesh_1=50 / flesh_0=13). Neck and hand blocks also flesh_0-dominant; blink/hooded lids now soot_3 (flesh_0 lids would vanish on the flesh_0 face). Geometry, metrics, poses, and anchor unchanged from v001. Palette-clean via check-palette.ts; inspected at 8x sheet + 16x head crop.
